title: User Guides - Onboarding > Fit test for currently connected device
scenario: Verify that the Fit test can be started for the currently connected device via User Guides > Onboarding section in App Settings.
steps: Navigate to User Guides > Onboarding section.
Ensure a device (Osprey/Tern/Emu) is currently connected.
Attempt to start the Fit test from the Onboarding section.
expected: The Fit test can be started successfully for the connected device.
